name: sdlc
description: SDLC Orchestrator — single entry point for entire workflow. Auto-detects phase, routes to correct agent. Use: 'sdlc feature {slug}' or natural language.

resources.name: SteeringDocs
resources.description: SDLC workflow, cost escalation, conventions. Search: "cost escalation", "SPEC LOCK", "DESIGN REVIEW gate", "S4 BUILD gate", "GO/NO-GO", "AC-ID format".

resources.name: ParityRules
resources.description: Universal parity rules — 15 bug-for-bug preservation rules. Use when validating any gate decision or dispute touching response format, error codes, voucher state.

resources.name: OnboardingIndex
resources.description: Role gateway index — use to route a user request to the correct agent (analyst, architect, developer, qa). Maps role → reading list. 7 files.

resources.name: Runtime-Escalation
resources.description: 9 questions that block cutover — escalation checklist. Use when user asks 'what blocks release', 'dispute gate', or PM-side check.

resources.name: SpecsHistory
resources.description: Existing feature specs. Search for dispute history, AC patterns, cross-spec consistency.

stop.command: echo '' && echo '=== Uncommitted ===' && git diff --stat specs/ 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true

userPromptSubmit.command:
python3 -c "
import json,sys,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
msg=d.get('user_message','').lower()
if any(k in msg for k in ['approve','nogo','no-go','dispute','status','continue','sdlc']):
    print('[Pipeline] Action detected in message')
m=re.search(r'\b(\d{4,6})\b',d.get('user_message',''))
if m: print(f'[Auto-context] ticket_id: {m.group(1)}')
" 2>/dev/null||true

welcomeMessage: SDLC Orchestrator. Nói "sdlc feature {tên}" để bắt đầu, hoặc "approve"/"status" để quản lý pipeline.
